query:
SELECT id, claim_id, status, estimated_cost, stage_output_json, 
       causal_verdict_json, repair_intelligence_json, cost_intelligence_json,
       fraud_breakdown_json, physics_analysis_json, damage_analysis_json,
       narrative_json, final_report_json, created_at, updated_at
FROM ai_assessments
WHERE claim_id = 2730001
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;
